title: What's new in v2.68.0
content:
Features:
- Free arrangement for tiles within tilesets.
- JSON option for spritesheet export.
- Quick onion skin range adjustment.

Enhancements:
- The magic wand can work with multiple selected layers.
- Preview can be turned off.
- Tags can be disabled.
- Added selection modes to keyboard shortcuts.
- Eyedropper can pick colors from tiled canvases.
- Some minor performance enhancements.

Fixes:
- The gesture pad cannot switch to the selection tool from the shape tool.
- Presets sometimes save the incorrect tools.
- Minor visual color correction for the saturation value of the color picker.
